title: Portfolio
description: Developed a responsive portfolio website using Next.js, React, and TypeScript to showcase projects and technical skills.
Built reusable React components and implemented modern animations with Styled Components to create a consistent and maintainable UI.
Developed a secure contact form featuring multi-step validation, spam detection, email verification, and automated message delivery via external REST APIs.
Ensured cross-browser compatibility while optimizing application performance and page load times across different browsers and devices.
Deployed and continuously maintained the application on Vercel, including the configuration of automated deployment workflows.
Achieved a Lighthouse score of 100/100 in Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO.

title: Car Rental
description: Developed a responsive React web application for vehicle search and reservation using a component-based architecture.
Managed application state with Redux Toolkit and integrated a REST API using Axios to dynamically display and filter vehicle data.
Implemented interactive search and filtering features, a favorites system with Local Storage persistence, and a modal-based vehicle details view.
Built a responsive user interface and implemented modern animations using Emotion and Framer Motion to ensure a consistent user experience across different devices.
Configured an automated CI/CD workflow with GitHub Actions to deploy the application to GitHub Pages.

title: Goose Track
text: Role: Frontend Team Lead, Scrum Master, Frontend Developer.
description: Developed a responsive React web application for personal task and calendar management with Google Authentication as part of a full-stack team project.

Implemented core monthly calendar functionality, including the user interface, interaction logic, and state management with Redux Toolkit, while collaborating closely with the backend team on REST API integration and issue resolution.
Led a frontend team of 9 developers, conducted Code Reviews, and ensured consistent development standards and code quality.
Served as Scrum Master, organizing the development workflow with Trello, facilitating Agile ceremonies, and coordinating collaboration across the frontend team.

title: Phonebook
description: Developed a responsive contact management web application using React and Redux Toolkit with an intuitive and user-friendly interface.
Designed and implemented a RESTful API using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB to handle user authentication, contact management, and persistent data storage.
Integrated the frontend with the REST API using Axios and managed application state with Redux Toolkit.
Implemented CRUD functionality for creating, updating, deleting, and filtering contacts, while ensuring a responsive user experience across different devices.
Deployed the backend to a DigitalOcean server, including server environment configuration and application deployment.
